title: Day 4 Lesson 1 ( Video )Talking about breakfast
html:
Day 4 - Lesson 1

あさごはんの　はなしを　する = Talking about breakfast

ばしょ (Location): きょうしつ　= Classroom

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): さとうさん、たかはしさん がくせい ふたり (Sato-san, Takahashi-san two students)

The new words in this lesson are:

あさごはん (asa gohan) = breakfast

あさ (asa) = morning

ごはん (gohan) = meal

たべます (tabemas) = to eat

ぱん (pan) = bread

たまご (tamago) = egg

こーひー (koohii) = coffee

のみます (nomimas) = to drink
